description_long: This is a robust wooden storage box constructed from weathered planks, reinforced at the corners with additional wooden beams and metal fasteners. The box features a diagonal support beam on each visible side, adding structural integrity and a classic crate appearance. The wood is aged, with a natural, light brown color and visible grain patterns, giving it a rustic, utilitarian look suitable for outdoor or industrial urban environments. The top is flat and made of closely fitted wooden planks, making it suitable for stacking or supporting other objects. There are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas, and the box appears to be fully enclosed. Its design suggests it is intended for storing or transporting goods and can be found in locations such as garages, warehouses, or urban alleys.
description: A sturdy, weathered wooden storage box with reinforced corners and diagonal support beams, featuring a rustic, utilitarian appearance and a flat, plank-style top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the diagonal support beam running from bottom left to top right, with visible wood grain and metal fasteners at the corners.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, with the diagonal support beam running from bottom left to top right and similar wood texture.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same diagonal support beam and reinforced corners, highlighting the uniformity of the box's construction.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the diagonal support beam and consistent wood finish, with no visible openings or handles.
